steps.title: Close the parenthetical
steps.content: The sentence gives definitions in parentheses: "mustang" is followed by "(a wild horse)." The definition of "rodeo" starts with an opening parenthesis, so the blank must close that parenthetical before the sentence continues.

steps.title: Choose matching punctuation
steps.content: Choice A leaves the parenthesis open. Choice C uses a semicolon but still fails to close the parenthetical. Choice D uses an em dash, which does not match the opening parenthesis. The needed punctuation closes the definition in the same pattern used earlier. The answer is B.
